sqlMap.select:
SELECT B.theme_id AS themeid,
B.theme_name AS themename, B.theme_content AS themecontent,
B.theme_name2 AS themename, B.theme_content2 AS themecontent,
B.theme_name3 AS themename, B.theme_content3 AS themecontent,
B.theme_name2 AS themename, B.theme_content4 AS themecontent,
B.theme_name2 AS themename, B.theme_content4 AS themecontent,
B.theme_name2 AS themename, B.theme_content4 AS themecontent,
A.theme_used AS themeused, A.theme_default AS themedefault FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.theme_id = #themeId#

SELECT B.theme_id AS themeid, B.frame_id AS frameid, B.frame_name AS framename, A.frame_used AS frameused, A.frame_default AS framedefault FROM TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id AND A.frame_id = B.frame_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.theme_id = #themeId#

SELECT A.menu_id AS menuid, C.menu_name AS menuname, A.menu_used AS menuused, B.menu_Type AS menutype, A.company_lang AS companylang, B.menu_url AS menuurl, CASE WHEN A.icon_url IS NULL THEN B.icon_url ELSE A.icon_url END AS iconurl, CASE WHEN A.company_order IS NULL THEN B.default_order ELSE A.company_order END AS defaultorder, B.menucode FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU B ON A.menu_id = B.menu_id JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.company_id = C.company_id AND A.menu_id = C.menu_id AND C.menu_lang = #menuLang# WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId#
AND B.menu_type IN ('G', 'A')
AND B.menu_type IN ('MG', 'MA')
ORDER BY defaultorder

SELECT A.menu_id AS menuid, B.menu_type AS menutype, C.menu_name AS menuname, A.menu_used AS menuused, A.company_lang AS companylang, B.menu_url AS menuurl, CASE WHEN A.icon_url IS NULL THEN B.icon_url ELSE A.icon_url END AS iconurl, CASE WHEN A.company_order IS NULL THEN B.default_order ELSE A.company_order END AS defaultorder, B.menucode, A.openType FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU B ON A.menu_id = B.menu_id JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.company_id = C.company_id AND A.menu_id = C.menu_id AND C.menu_lang = #menuLang# WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.menu_id = #menuId#

SELECT A.menu_lang AS menulang, A.menu_name AS menuname FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.menu_id = B.menu_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.menu_id = #menuId#
A.menu_lang = #primaryLang#
AND A.menu_lang != 3
AND A.menu_lang != 4
AND A.menu_lang != 5
AND A.menu_lang != 6
ORDER BY CASE A.menu_lang WHEN B.company_lang THEN 1 ELSE 2 END

SELECT menu_id AS menuid, user_id AS userid, CASE WHEN user_type = 1 THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND cn = user_id) WHEN user_type = 2 THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND jobid = user_id AND type = '001' AND companyid = #companyId#) WHEN user_type = 3 THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND jobid = user_id AND type = '002' AND companyid = #companyId#) WHEN user_type = 4 THEN (SELECT group_name FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND group_id = user_id AND company_id = #companyId#) ELSE '' END AS username, CASE WHEN user_type = 1 THEN ifnull((SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN description2 ELSE description END FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND cn = user_id), (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn in (SELECT deptid FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE cn = user_id) and extensionattribute2 = #companyId# limit 1)) ELSE (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = user_id) END AS userdeptname, user_type AS usertype, access_yn AS accessyn, subdept_permitted as subdeptPermitted FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId# AND access_yn = #accessType# ORDER BY sn, user_type
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP SET theme_used = #themeUsed#, theme_default = #themeDefault# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND theme_id = #themeId#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP SET frame_used = #frameUsed#, frame_default = #frameDefault# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND theme_id = #themeId# AND frame_id = #frameId#

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP SET menu_used = #menuUsed#, openType = #openType#
icon_url = #iconUrl#
icon_url = #iconUrl#
WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU SET menu_url = #menuUrl#
icon_url = #iconUrl#
icon_url = #iconUrl#
icon_url = #iconUrl#
icon_url = #iconUrl#
WHERE menu_id = #menuId#

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, menu_name, company_id, tenant_id) VALUES (#menuId#, #menuLang#, #menuName#, #companyId#, #tenantId#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE menu_name = #menuName#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP SET portlet_used = #portletUsed# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH (menu_id, user_id, user_type, access_yn, company_id, tenant_id, sn, subdept_permitted) VALUES (#menuId#, #userId#, #userType#, #accessYN#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #sn#, #subdeptPermitted#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE access_yn = #accessYN#, sn = #sn#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP SET company_order = #companyOrder# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU (menu_url, menu_type, icon_url, default_order) VALUES (#menuUrl#, #menuType#, #iconUrl#, (SELECT MAX(A.default_order) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU A))
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP (menu_id, menu_used, company_lang, company_order, company_id, tenant_id) VALUES (#menuId#, #menuUsed#, #companyLang#, (SELECT MAX(A.company_order) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#), #companyId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.boardid as id, A.parentboardid as parent, A.boardname as boardname1, CASE WHEN (A.Boardname2 = '' OR A.Boardname2 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname2 END as boardname2, CASE WHEN (A.Boardname3 = '' OR A.Boardname3 IS NULL) THEN A.Boardname ELSE A.Boardname3 END as boardname3, A.treevieworder as sort, B.parentboardid as topParent, A.boardcolor, IFNULL(A.gubun, -1) as gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO A LEFT JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.parentboardid = B.boardid WHERE
A.parentboardid = #parentBoardId#
A.boardtreepath LIKE CONCAT('%', #parentBoardId#, '%')
AND (A.companyid = #companyId# OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND A.tenant_id = #tenantId# ORDER BY A.treevieworder
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET (menu_id, portlet_url, portlet_type, default_order, portletcode) VALUES
(#menuId#, #connectionUrl#, 'A', (SELECT MAX(A.DEFAULT_ORDER) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET A WHERE A.PORTLET_TYPE IN ('A', 'G')), #portletCode#)
(#menuId#, #connectionUrl#, 'MA', (SELECT MAX(A.DEFAULT_ORDER) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET A WHERE A.PORTLET_TYPE IN ('MA', 'MG')), #portletCode#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP (company_id, tenant_id, portlet_id, menu_id, portlet_category, connection_url, portlet_used, portlet_order, board_id, connection_id) VALUES
(#companyId#, #tenantId#, #portletId#, #menuId#, #portletCategory#, #connectionUrl#, #portletUsed#, (SELECT MAX(portlet_order) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#), #boardId#, #connectionId#)
(#companyId#, #tenantId#, #portletId#, #menuId#, #portletCategory#, #connectionUrl#, #portletUsed#, (SELECT MAX(portlet_order) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#), #boardId#, #connectionId#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME SET menu_id = #menuId#, portlet_name = #portletName# WHERE portlet_id = #portletId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_lang = #portletLang#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (portlet_id, menu_id, portlet_lang, tenant_id, company_id, portlet_name) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, #portletLang#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #portletName#)
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP SET menu_id = #menuId#, portlet_used = #portletUsed#, connection_id = #connectionId#, board_id = #boardId#
connection_url = #connectionUrl#
WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET SET menu_id = #menuId#, portletcode = #portletCode#
portlet_url = #connectionUrl#
WHERE portlet_id = #portletId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE portlet_id = #portletId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_id = #poortletId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP SET portlet_order = #portletOrder# WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#

update.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_LOGO (company_id, tenant_id, logo_type, logo_url) VALUES (#companyId#, #tenantId#, #logoType#, #logoUrl#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE logo_url = #logoUrl#
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_LOGO (company_id, tenant_id, logo_type, logo_url) VALUES (#tenantId#, #tenantId#, #logoType#, #logoUrl#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE logo_url = #logoUrl#
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_LOGO (company_id, tenant_id, logo_type, logo_url) VALUES (#companyId#, #tenantId#, #logoType#, #logoUrl#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE logo_url = #logoUrl#
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_LOGO (company_id, tenant_id, logo_type, logo_url) VALUES (#tenantId#, #tenantId#, #logoType#, #logoUrl#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE logo_url = #logoUrl#
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_LOGO (company_id, tenant_id, logo_type, logo_url) VALUES (#companyId#, #tenantId#, #logoType#, #logoUrl#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE logo_url = #logoUrl#

sqlMap.select: SELECT logo_url as logourl, logo_type as logotype FROM TBL_PORTAL_LOGO WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT tenant_id FROM TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME WHERE server_name = #serverName#
SELECT portlet_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_USER WHERE menu_id = #menuId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER WHERE portlet_id = #portletId# AND menu_id = #menuId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_portal_theme_comp SET theme_default = CASE WHEN theme_id = #themeId# THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, theme_used = CASE WHEN theme_id = #themeId# THEN 1 ELSE theme_used END WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP SET theme_default = CASE WHEN theme_id = #themeId# THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_LOGO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND logo_type = #logoType#
AND company_id = #tenantId#
AND company_id = #tenantId#
AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER SET is_default = CASE WHEN used_theme = (SELECT theme_id FROM tbl_portal_theme_comp WHERE theme_default = 1 AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM (SELECT user_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER WHERE used_theme = #themeId# AND is_default = 1) tmp)

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER SET used_frame = (SELECT frame_id FROM tbl_portal_frame_comp WHERE frame_default = 1 AND theme_id = #themeId# AND company_id = #companyId#) WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND used_theme = #themeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE , URL FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND IMAGEPATH like '%slideImagePortlet%' ORDER BY SN
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE ( SLIDERID, SLIDERNAME, SLIDERNAME2, FILENAME, IMAGEPATH, REGUSERID, REGDATE, COMPANYID, ISUSE, SN, TENANT_ID, URL ) VALUES ( #slideId#, 'slideImagePotlet', 'slideImagePotlet', #fileName#, #slideImagePath#, #regUserId#, #regDate#, #companyId#, 1, #count# + 1, #tenantID#, #imageUrl# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE , URL FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND SLIDERID = #slideId# ORDER BY SN
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SN), 0) FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND IMAGEPATH like '%slideImagePortlet%'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET IMAGEPATH = #slideImagePath#, REGUSERID = #regUserId#, REGDATE = #regDate#, FILENAME = #fileName#, URL = #imageUrl# WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND SLIDERID = #slideId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND SLIDERID = #slideId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET sn = #order# WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND SLIDERID = #slideId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.theme_id as themeid, A.tenant_id as tenantid, A.company_id as companyid, A.portlet_id as portletid, A.portlet_used as portletused, A.portlet_order as portletorder, A.menu_id as menuid, C.portlet_name as portletname, A.is_fixed as isFixed, PORTLET.portletcode, MENU.menucode, PCS.CLASS_SIZE AS classSize FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP B ON A.portlet_id = B.portlet_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND B.portlet_used = 1 LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET PORTLET ON A.portlet_id = PORTLET.portlet_id LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU MENU ON PORTLET.menu_id = MENU.menu_id LEFT JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME C ON A.portlet_id = C.portlet_id AND A.company_id = C.company_id AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND C.portlet_lang = #lang# LEFT JOIN (SELECT CS.*, PS.CLASS_SIZE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMPANY_SIZE CS JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE PS ON CS.SIZE_ID = PS.SIZE_ID WHERE DEFAULT_FLAG = TRUE) PCS ON PCS.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND PCS.COMPANY_ID = A.COMPANY_ID AND PCS.THEME_ID = A.THEME_ID AND PCS.PORTLET_ID = A.PORTLET_ID WHERE A.theme_id = #themeId# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# ORDER BY A.portlet_order
sqlMap.update: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET ( theme_id, tenant_id, company_id, portlet_id, portlet_used, portlet_order, menu_id, is_fixed ) VALUES ( #themeId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #portletId#, #portletUsed#, (SELECT portlet_order FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#), #menuId#, #isFixed# ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE portlet_used = #portletUsed#, portlet_order = #portletOrder#, is_fixed = #isFixed#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET SET menu_id = #menuId# WHERE theme_id = #themeId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET SET portlet_order = #portletOrder# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT theme_id AS themeid, user_id AS userid, CASE WHEN user_type = 1 THEN (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND cn = user_id) WHEN user_type = 2 THEN (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND jobid = user_id AND type = '001' AND companyid = #companyId#) WHEN user_type = 3 THEN (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND jobid = user_id AND type = '002' AND companyid = #companyId#) WHEN user_type = 4 THEN (SELECT group_name FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND group_id = user_id AND company_id = #companyId#) ELSE '' END AS username, CASE WHEN user_type = 1 THEN IFNULL((SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN description2 ELSE description END FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND cn = user_id), (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn in (SELECT deptid FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE cn = user_id) AND extensionattribute2 = #companyId# LIMIT 1)) ELSE (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = user_id) END AS userdeptname, user_type AS usertype, access_yn AS accessyn, subdept_permitted AS subdeptPermitted FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND theme_id = #themeId#
AND access_yn = #accessType#
AND user_id = #userId#
ORDER BY sn, user_type
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND theme_id = #themeId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT theme_id AS themeId, access_yn as accessYn FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND user_id = #userId#
(user_type = 0)
(user_type = 1)

SELECT portlet_id AS portletid, user_id AS userid, CASE WHEN user_type = 1 THEN (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND cn = user_id) WHEN user_type = 2 THEN (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND jobid = user_id AND type = '001' AND companyid = #companyId#) WHEN user_type = 3 THEN (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND jobid = user_id AND type = '002' AND companyid = #companyId#) WHEN user_type = 4 THEN (SELECT group_name FROM TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND group_id = user_id AND company_id = #companyId#) ELSE '' END AS username, CASE WHEN user_type = 1 THEN IFNULL((SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN description2 ELSE description END FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND cn = user_id), (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn in (SELECT deptid FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE cn = user_id) AND extensionattribute2 = #companyId# LIMIT 1)) ELSE (SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = user_id) END AS userdeptname, user_type AS usertype, access_yn AS accessyn, subdept_permitted as subdeptPermitted FROM TBL_PORTAL_Portlet_AUTH WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_id = #portletId# AND access_yn = #accessType# ORDER BY sn, user_type
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.cn FROM tbl_usermaster A LEFT JOIN tbl_portal_theme_auth B ON A.physicaldeliveryofficename = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.cn = B.user_id WHERE A.cn in (select user_id from tbl_portal_theme_auth where B.access_yn = 0 and B.user_type = 1) AND A.department = #userId# AND B.theme_id != #themeId# AND B.company_id = #companyId# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# GROUP BY A.cn HAVING COUNT(B.theme_id) > 1

select d.CN as id, IF(d.extensionattribute1 = null
or d.CN = #companyId#
,'##', d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END AS text, case d.CN when d.extensionattribute2 then 'comp' else 'dept' end as isComp, case d.CN when u.DEPARTMENT then 'yes' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and not((d.extensionattribute1 is null or d.extensionattribute1 = '') and d.cn <> d.extensionattribute2)
and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN d.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE d.DISPLAYNAME END

select * from (select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END AS user_name, CN as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TITLE2 ELSE TITLE END AS jikwi, MAIL as mail, DEPARTMENT as dept_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DESCRIPTION2 ELSE DESCRIPTION END AS dept_name, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_img, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 'user' as userType from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and CN not in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
DISPLAYNAME CN DESCRIPTION TITLE TELEPHONENUMBER MOBILE HOMEPHONE FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER MAIL STREETADDRESS like concat('%', #value#, '%')
DEPARTMENT = #value#
union all
select CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME END AS user_name, A.CN as user_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TITLE2 ELSE B.TITLE END AS jikwi, A.MAIL as mail, B.DEPTID as dept_id, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS dept_name, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_img, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 'addJob' as userType from tbl_addjobmaster B join tbl_usermaster A on A.CN = B.CN and A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID join tbl_deptmaster C on B.DEPTID = C.CN and B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID where B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
A.DISPLAYNAME A.CN A.DESCRIPTION A.TITLE A.TELEPHONENUMBER A.MOBILE A.HOMEPHONE A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER A.MAIL A.STREETADDRESS like concat('%', #value#, '%')
B.DEPTID = #value#
) AA ORDER BY 8 ASC, 1 ASC LIMIT #curPage#, #pageSize#

select count(*) AS count from (select CN as user_id from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and CN not in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
DISPLAYNAME CN DESCRIPTION TITLE TELEPHONENUMBER MOBILE HOMEPHONE FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER MAIL STREETADDRESS like concat('%', #value#, '%')
DEPARTMENT = #value#
union all
select A.CN as user_id from tbl_addjobmaster B join tbl_usermaster A on A.CN = B.CN and A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID join tbl_deptmaster C on B.DEPTID = C.CN and B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID where B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
A.DISPLAYNAME A.CN A.DESCRIPTION A.TITLE A.TELEPHONENUMBER A.MOBILE A.HOMEPHONE A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER A.MAIL A.STREETADDRESS like concat('%', #value#, '%')
B.DEPTID = #value#
) AA
SELECT CLASS_SIZE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE
sqlMap.update: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMPANY_SIZE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND THEME_ID = #themeId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMPANY_SIZE (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_ID, THEME_ID, SIZE_ID, DEFAULT_FLAG) VALUES
( #[].tenantId#, #[].companyId#, #[].portletId#, #[].themeId#, (SELECT SIZE_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE WHERE CLASS_SIZE = #[].portletSize# LIMIT 1) , #[].default# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT TYPE FROM TBL_PORTAL_TOP_COMPANY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_TOP_COMPANY SET TYPE = #type# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_TOP_COMPANY (COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE) VALUES (#companyID#, #tenantID#, #type#)
